name: google-maps-scraper
title: Google Maps Scraper - Local Business Data Extractor
description: Free PhantomBuster & Outscraper alternative. Scrape Google Maps business listings: name, address, phone, website, ratings, reviews, opening hours, GPS coordinates. Two modes: keyword search and direct place URL scraping. Multi-language support (en, ja, es, de, etc.). Bulk processing, JSON/CSV export. No Google API key, no Cloud billing. Pay-per-use from $0.01/listing. Ideal for local SEO, lead generation, market research, and business directory building.
